About

Trusted Electronics & Appliance Shop in Multan

TCL Center 01 is located near Gourmet Bakery, Gulshan Market, Multan. We specialize in TCL TVs and TCL ACs, while also offering refrigerators, deep freezers, ovens, coolers, washing machines and other small home appliances from different trusted companies.

Our team helps customers compare models, features, sizes, budgets and availability before purchase.

✓ TCL TVs & ACs
✓ Home appliances
✓ Product guidance
✓ Warranty guidance
